evals.prompt: I just added a new login page component, commit it for me
evals.expected_output: A conventional commit with type feat, a concise lowercase message under 72 characters, no trailing period.
assertions: The commit message starts with feat:
The message after the type prefix is lowercase
The full message is under 72 characters
No trailing period on the message
The commit hash and message are shown after committing

evals.expected_output: The skill analyzes the diff, determines the correct type, and creates a well-formed conventional commit without needing more context from the user.
assertions: The commit message follows type: description format
The type matches the nature of the actual changes in the diff (feat, fix, refactor, docs, or chore)
The message is lowercase after the type prefix with no trailing period
Specific files are staged (not git add . or git add -A)
The commit uses the HEREDOC format for the commit message

evals.prompt: I fixed a null pointer crash in the checkout flow, commit please
evals.expected_output: A conventional commit with type fix and a concise description of the bug fix.
assertions: The commit message starts with fix:
The description mentions the fix clearly
The message is a single line under 72 characters
The message is lowercase after the type prefix with no trailing period
The commit hash and message are shown after committing

evals.prompt: I updated the README with installation instructions
evals.expected_output: A conventional commit with type docs and a concise description.
assertions: The commit message starts with docs:
The message is lowercase after the type prefix with no trailing period
The full message is under 72 characters
Does NOT push to remote

evals.prompt: I restructured the auth module to split it into separate files but nothing changed functionally
evals.expected_output: A conventional commit with type refactor describing the restructuring.
assertions: The commit message starts with refactor:
The message is lowercase after the type prefix with no trailing period
The full message is under 72 characters
The message describes the restructuring without implying behavior change
